title: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Q1 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Teledyne Technologies' (TDY) first-quarter earnings and revenues surpass estimates. Each of its segments reports year-over-year growth in net sales.

title: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) came out with quarterly earnings of $4.53 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $4.43 per share. This compares to earnings of $4.27 per share a year ago.

title: Teledyne Technologies Reports First Quarter Results
text: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) Record first quarter sales of $1,383.3 million, an increase of 4.7% compared with last year First quarter GAAP diluted earnings per share of $3.73 Record first quarter non-GAAP diluted earnings per share of $4.53 Record first quarter GAAP operating margin of 17.5% and non-GAAP operating margin of 21.1% Record first quarter cash from operations of $203.0 million Completed the acquisition of ChartWorld Internati.

title: Aerospace & Defense Stocks Q1 Earnings Due Apr 26: BA, GD & TDY
text: The aerospace and defense stocks' Q1 results are likely to reflect growing global air travel and defense order flow amid supply-chain issues. Let's see how BA, GD & TDY are likely to perform this time.

title: Teledyne Technologies: Quality Prevails
text: Shares of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated have seen solid growth following the FLIR deal. I like the long-term performance and positioning of both the company and its shares.

title: RTX vs. TDY: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Aerospace - Defense Equipment sector might want to consider either Raytheon Technologies (RTX) or Teledyne Technologies (TDY). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: Teledyne Announces First Quarter 2023 Earnings Webcast Details
text: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) will hold a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2023 results on Wednesday, April 26, 2023, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific. A press release with the first quarter financial results will be issued before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, April 26, 2023. To access the call, go to www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations approximately ten minutes before the scheduled start time.

title: The Best Defense Stocks For Today — And The Future
text: The best defense stocks have long-term programs as well as footholds in key emerging priorities for the Pentagon and U.S. allies.

title: Teledyne (TDY) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Teledyne (TDY) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).
